mission.title: wasmedge-runtime: bug: uninstaller not working when the `.bash_profile` is not a regular file.
mission.description: bug: uninstaller not working when the `.bash_profile` is not a regular file.. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify wasmedge-runtime troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your wasmedge-runtime installation:
```bash
wasmedge --version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review wasmedge-runtime configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant wasmedge-runtime configuration:
Please check this issue:
https://github.com/second-state/LlamaEdge/issues/100

Someone is running the `installer`. However, it will run the uninstaller first to remove the previous installation. Then, it encountered the bug.

steps.title: Apply the fix for bug: uninstaller not working when the `.bash_profile` is…
steps.description:
It's on macOS. Additionally, according to the report, it will occur on both Intel and Apple Silicon platforms. The root cause of this issue is that the command usage of `sed` differs between macOS and Linux. See https://github.com/WasmEdge/WasmEdge/issues/3185#issuecomment-2187919503

Therefore, you just need to create a .bash_profile on macOS and try running the installer and uninstaller to trigger it. It's acceptable to include these tests in the installer workflows to verify the fix.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm bug: uninstaller not working when the… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test wasmedge-runtime to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: It's on macOS. Additionally, according to the report, it will occur on both Intel and Apple Silicon platforms. The root cause of this issue is that the command usage of `sed` differs between macOS and Linux.

prerequisites.description: A working wasmedge-runtime installation or development environment.
